prestazioni: Engine swap to a Mazda **WL-T 2.5L turbocharged diesel (engine code: WL-T)** with a **Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger** and **HKS 264° camshafts** for increased airflow and mid-range torque, paired with a **Tomei 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe** and **SARD 800cc injectors** to support 400+ hp on **E85 fuel** with a **Haltech Elite 2500 ECU** for precise tuning.

Full **NISMO 4-piston brake calipers** with **DBA 5000 Series rotors** (355mm front, 330mm rear) and **Project Mu 999.9 compound brake pads** for aggressive stopping power, paired with **Bilstein B16 coilovers** (custom valved for the Titan Cab’s leaf spring rear) and **Whiteline 25mm front sway bar** to reduce body roll during high-speed cornering on tight mountain passes.

Custom **Titan Cab-specific 4.88:1 gear ratio** in the **Mazda M5OD-R2 5-speed manual transmission** with a **PPG close-ratio gear set** and **OS Giken twin-plate clutch**, reinforced with a **Peloquin LSD** for maximum traction off the line, paired with **Nitto NT05R 265/70R16 tires** on **Rays Volk Racing TE37SL wheels (16x9 +15 offset)** for optimal grip.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit** (custom-fabricated for the Titan Cab’s unique chassis) with **carbon fiber fender flares** and **polycarbonate side windows** to reduce weight, paired with a **Seibon carbon fiber hood** featuring a **custom 3-inch cowl scoop** for the WL-T intercooler piping.

**JDM-spec Mazda Titan Cab front bumper** (OEM part #BHY1-50-500C) with **DEPO LED projector headlights** and **Morimoto HID retrofit kit**, complemented by a **custom rear diffuser** (fabricated from 3mm aluminum) and **Oracle Lighting RGB underglow** with **CAN-BUS error-free controllers** for a stealthy yet aggressive stance.

**Recaro SRD-X seats** (custom-mounted to the Titan Cab’s floorpan) with **Schroth 6-point harnesses** and a **Momo Prototipo steering wheel** (350mm, suede) on a **NRG quick-release hub**, paired with a **full custom roll cage** (TIG-welded 4130 chromoly) painted in **Gloss Gunmetal** with **Soundstream VFL-1000B 10-inch subwoofer** mounted in the bed for audio performance.
